title: Ukrainian Cottage Cheese Roast
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring cottage cheese and roast, with an intense peppery flavor, this recipe is low-fat-friendly and perfect for a nostalgic meal. It is a molten, savory delight that will transport you to the Ukrainian countryside.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the cottage cheese, roast beef, black pepper, onion, garlic, salt, and paprika, and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and pour in the chicken broth.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
Reheat the dish in the oven or on the stovetop until warmed through.
